story.text: # 0xagentprivacy — The Guide

Welcome to the **federated guide** to agentprivacy: the dual-agent privacy framework, the skills its agents carry, the canon that grounds it, and the city it lives in. Everything here is a **forkable wiki page** — read it, fork it, write on it, carry it away with its lineage. The git repositories remain the source of truth; this wiki is a projection that records its origin.

## The federation

The guide is the front door. Each part of the canon is its own forkable wiki site:

- 🗃️ **The Skill Library** (LIVE) — 163 forkable skills — 42 personas + role / privacy-layer / meta / wikis. Fork any page to materialize a local `SKILL.md`.
- 📖 **The Tomes & Cast** (LIVE) — the Second-Person Spellbook (59 acts, Tomes I–X — incl. IX the Horizon and X the Hearth) + cast + 12 specs — the lore that holds the system.
- 🧮 **The Research & Conjectures** (LIVE) — the privacy-value model V(π,t), the conjecture register C1–C96 (one page each, incl. Band X — the Hearthold Reading), and the PVM v6 papers.
- 🌐 **The Atlas** (LIVE) — the knowledge graph — 683 nodes and 1,654 edges — the backbone that hyperlinks every other site.
- 📚 **The Library** (LIVE) — the five narrative spellbooks — the Story, Parallel Society, Plurality, the Privacymage Grimoire (Zero), and the blockchain Canon — full book prose, one page per act/chapter/tale.
- ⿻ **The Harness** (LIVE) — the dual-agent harness — soulbae 🧙 proposes, soulbis ⚔️ proves, the Gap ⿻ holds them apart: seven seats, six trusts, ten ground rules, and ten workshop paths grouped by loop weight.
- 🔮 **The Grimoire** (LIVE) — the grimoire as a spellbook of atoms — 70 spells, 18 incantations, 17 vertices, proverbs, blades, principles, and Selene’s Spellbook poems, each forkable and cross-linked to its persona.

### 🚪 Enter the sites

Each is its own subdomain — click to cross straight in:

- 🗃️ **[The Skill Library](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors)** — 163 forkable skills — 42 personas + role / privacy-layer / meta / wikis. Fork any page to materialize a local `SKILL.md`.
- 📖 **[The Tomes & Cast](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors)** — the Second-Person Spellbook (59 acts, Tomes I–X — incl. IX the Horizon and X the Hearth) + cast + 12 specs — the lore that holds the system.
- 🧮 **[The Research & Conjectures](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors)** — the privacy-value model V(π,t), the conjecture register C1–C96 (one page each, incl. Band X — the Hearthold Reading), and the PVM v6 papers.
- 🌐 **[The Atlas](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors)** — the knowledge graph — 683 nodes and 1,654 edges — the backbone that hyperlinks every other site.
- 📚 **[The Library](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors)** — the five narrative spellbooks — the Story, Parallel Society, Plurality, the Privacymage Grimoire (Zero), and the blockchain Canon — full book prose, one page per act/chapter/tale.
- ⿻ **[The Harness](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors)** — the dual-agent harness — soulbae 🧙 proposes, soulbis ⚔️ proves, the Gap ⿻ holds them apart: seven seats, six trusts, ten ground rules, and ten workshop paths grouped by loop weight.
- 🔮 **[The Grimoire](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors)** — the grimoire as a spellbook of atoms — 70 spells, 18 incantations, 17 vertices, proverbs, blades, principles, and Selene’s Spellbook poems, each forkable and cross-linked to its persona.
*The flags below federate each site into your neighbourhood, so search and the live index reach the whole family:*
